prevalence.trend: stable to decreasing with nutrition programs

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; impacts growth and development

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Height < -2 SD for age/sex or poor growth velocity; evaluate endocrine and systemic causes

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: routine growth monitoring in primary care
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; depends on access to endocrine evaluation

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Growth charts used in UBS; referral for endocrine workup
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Nutritional support and treatment of underlying causes; GH therapy for select cases
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Primary care growth surveillance and nutrition programs
